title: Global Cell and Gene Therapy CDMO Market Anticipating Remarkable Growth at a CAGR of ~24% by 2034 | DelveInsight
author: Delveinsight
description: The cell and gene therapy CDMO market is projected to grow from USD 8.3 billion in 2025 to USD 57.1 billion by 2034, driven by increasing clinical development of advanced therapies, rising outsourcing trends among biopharma companies, and technological advancements in manufacturing. North America leads the market with 40% share, while Asia-Pacific emerges as a significant growth hub. Key players are expanding manufacturing capabilities through strategic partnerships.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Expanded commercial manufacturing agreement in March 2026 for gene therapy production, reflecting increasing commercial demand and strong market presence in gene therapy manufacturing services.

Identified as a key player in the cell and gene therapy CDMO market with established manufacturing and testing capabilities, well-positioned for market growth.
Listed among leading CDMO companies and positioned as a strategic hub in Asia-Pacific region with cost-effective operations and skilled talent pool.

title: Cell Banking Outsourcing Market: 16%+ CAGR (2026-2031), Expanding with Rising Demand for Biologics and Regenerative Medicine Services, Says Mordor Intelligence
author: Mordor Intelligence
description: The cell banking outsourcing market is projected to grow from USD 16.78 billion in 2025 to USD 42.31 billion by 2031, with a CAGR of 16.71%. Growth is driven by increasing demand for biologics, cell and gene therapies, and regenerative medicine. North America leads the market while Asia-Pacific emerges as a high-growth region. Biopharmaceutical companies are increasingly outsourcing cell banking operations to improve efficiency and reduce costs.

title: Global Plasmid DNA Manufacturing Market Anticipates Impressive Growth Trajectory at a CAGR of ~18% by 2034 | DelveInsight
author: Delveinsight
description: The plasmid DNA manufacturing market is projected to grow from USD 2.4 billion in 2025 to USD 10.8 billion by 2034, driven by rising demand for gene therapies, DNA vaccines, and CAR-T treatments. North America leads the market with 44.12% share, while Asia-Pacific emerges as a significant growth engine. Major companies are expanding GMP-compliant manufacturing capabilities to meet increasing demand from biopharmaceutical companies and CDMOs.

title: Global AAV Vector Manufacturing Market Gearing Up for Outstanding Expansion at a CAGR of ~22% by 2034 | DelveInsight
author: Delveinsight
description: The AAV vector manufacturing market is projected to grow from USD 874 million in 2025 to USD 5.2 billion by 2034, driven by expanding gene therapy research, increasing regulatory approvals, and rising investments in biomanufacturing infrastructure. North America leads the market with 43% share, while Asia-Pacific emerges as a key growth engine. Key drivers include growing prevalence of genetic disorders, technological advancements in manufacturing, and expansion of outsourcing to CDMOs.

title: Drug Development Services Market Research Report 2026: $50+ Bn Opportunities, Trends, Competitive Landscape, Strategies, and Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
